spreadsheet_name: North Shore Sales Coach - Demo Dashboard
purpose: Local blueprint for a future approved spreadsheet sync.

tabs.name: Users
notes: Resolve display_name in this order, accepting only non-empty trimmed strings: config/roles.json users.<telegram_user_id>.display_name; data/local_state.json users.<telegram_user_id>.display_name; trimmed Telegram first_name plus last_name joined with one space; Telegram username normalized with one leading @; Unregistered salesperson.

mapping.telegram_user_id: config/roles.json users object key, unioned with data/local_state.json users object key

tabs.name: Raw_Logs
notes: Salespeople and managers do not edit this tab directly.
Top-level fields map directly; parsed fields are flattened; arrays are compact JSON.

tabs.name: Daily_Team_Summary
tabs.row_policy: Emit exactly one row per generated daily report.

tabs.name: Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard
tabs.row_policy: Emit one row for each item in report.team; emit no rows when report.team is empty.

tabs.name: Followups
tabs.row_policy: Emit one row per item in each report.followups bucket: overdue, due, and upcoming.
notes: If a future local report item emits a separate followup_time field, map that value.
The current local report model does not emit followup_time, so the cell is blank.
Never infer or parse followup_time from next_step, raw_text, or any other free text unless deterministic local code first emits it as a separate field.

mapping.followup_status: name of containing report.followups bucket: overdue, due, or upcoming
mapping.followup_time: report.followups.<followup_status>[].followup_time when separately emitted by local code; otherwise blank

tabs.name: Missing_Data
tabs.row_policy: Flatten report.missing.not_updated, report.missing.incomplete_logs, and report.missing.unregistered_submitters into separate rows according to row_sources.

roster_no_update.cardinality: one row per active roster member without a complete update
roster_no_update.detail: Active roster member has no complete update for report_date.

incomplete_log.cardinality: one row per incomplete submitted log
incomplete_log.roster_status: active_roster when item.salesperson_id is in the active roster; otherwise unregistered
incomplete_log.detail: Submitted log is incomplete; identify the missing fields without copying raw customer text.

unregistered_submitter.cardinality: one row per distinct unregistered salesperson_id
unregistered_submitter.log_id: blank because the local aggregate does not emit a log_id
unregistered_submitter.detail: Submitter is not in the active roster.

mapping.missing_type: constant selected by row source: roster_no_update, incomplete_log, or unregistered_submitter
mapping.missing_fields_json: source-specific compact JSON value defined in row_sources
mapping.roster_status: source-specific constant or roster lookup defined in row_sources
mapping.detail: source-specific safe explanation defined in row_sources

tabs.name: Coaching_Flags
tabs.row_policy: Emit one row per item in report.coaching_flags; emit no rows when the list is empty.

mapping.log_id: blank unless future deterministic local code emits a log_id on the flag item

tabs.name: Report_Archive
notes: Required top-level fields map directly; summary_metrics are flattened; flags are compact JSON.

tabs.name: Dashboard_Daily
tabs.source: Daily_Team_Summary, Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard, Followups, Missing_Data, Coaching_Flags, Raw_Logs
notes: Ryan-facing executive cockpit for today's headline numbers, active reps, missing updates, follow-ups due, coaching attention, team sales-process progression, recent activity, and next manager actions.
Manager-facing dashboard views must not show raw Telegram identifiers.
Sheet-native formulas, protected ranges, frozen headers, conditional formatting, filter views, summary cards, sparklines, and charts are defined in dashboard_layout.md.

mapping.as_of_date: selected latest report_date from Daily_Team_Summary or Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard
mapping.section: formula/readout section name such as headline, progression, recent_activity, followup_pressure, missing_updates, coaching_attention, manager_actions
mapping.label: manager-friendly card or row label
mapping.value_formula: protected Google Sheets formula referencing normalized tabs
mapping.source_tabs: comma-separated supporting tabs used by formula

tabs.name: Team_Scorecard
notes: Includes logs submitted, people spoken to, appointments, test drives, worksheets/offers, asked-for-business count, follow-ups set, incomplete updates, coaching flags, process completion percentage, and trend/progress indicator.
Uses deterministic formulas only; no integration writer should append rows to this tab.

Team rows start with active Salespeople rows and also include display names present in Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard for the selected report date so synced scorecard data remains visible if the roster tab is incomplete.

metrics.log_activity_trend: SPARKLINE over seven days of Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard.updates per salesperson

mapping.as_of_date: selected latest report_date from Daily_Team_Summary or Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard
mapping.salesperson: active Salespeople.display_name plus Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard.display_name for selected as_of_date
mapping.active: Salespeople.active when roster row exists; synced_scorecard when present only in Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard
mapping.incomplete_updates: COUNTIFS(Missing_Data.report_date, as_of_date, Missing_Data.display_name, salesperson, Missing_Data.missing_type, incomplete_log)
mapping.status: On Track, Watch, Needs Attention, or No Update Yet from deterministic rules

tabs.name: Rep_Detail
tabs.source: Salespeople, Raw_Logs, Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard, Followups, Missing_Data, Coaching_Flags
notes: Salesperson drill-down tab with dropdown selector sourced from active Salespeople.display_name.
Shows selected salesperson summary, recent logs, sales-process step completion, follow-ups, coaching notes, progress over time, and clear manager next-action prompts.
Recent-log view must hide raw Telegram identifiers.

controls.salesperson_selector: Data validation dropdown from active Salespeople.display_name
controls.selected_date: defaults to latest report_date from Daily_Team_Summary or Daily_Salesperson_Scorecard

mapping.section: summary, recent_logs, process_steps, followups, coaching_notes, progress_over_time, manager_actions
mapping.label: manager-friendly label
